untranslatable_reason: Signal references a generic 'smoothed indicator' with a dynamic 'critical threshold' but does not specify which indicator to smooth or what threshold value to use. The rule requires user-defined indicator selection and threshold parameterization that cannot be inferred from the signal description alone. Additionally, sma_4 (4-day simple moving average) was used as a proxy for the 4-day linearly weighted moving average mentioned in the source text, but true linear weighting is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Source text specifies a 4-day linearly weighted moving average for smoothing, but allowed indicators only include standard SMA and EMA variants. Used sma_4 as the closest available smoothing proxy. The signal is pattern-based and context-dependent, supporting both long and short entries/exits depending on market regime. Critical threshold type is noted as 'static_or_dynamic' but no specific threshold value is provided—this rule requires parameterization at implementation time.
